name: Priya Sharma
quote: I moved from Bangalore and had three weeks to find a flat. Nivaas sorted everything in five days — the paperwork, the keys, even the internet setup. First time I've rented without a broker in Hyderabad.

name: Rohit and Ananya Mehta
quote: The maintenance response is what stands out. We had a geyser issue at 9pm on a Sunday. Nivaas had someone there by 10am Monday. Previous landlords took two weeks for simple repairs.

name: Karthik Reddy
quote: No brokerage, proper agreement, decent furniture, and someone who picks up the phone when I call. That is genuinely all I wanted. Nivaas delivers.

name: Venkat Rao
quote: I live in the US and needed someone I could trust to manage my apartment in Hyderabad. The monthly payout arrives on time and I get a call before any significant repair. I have not had to fly back for a single property issue in two years.

name: Lakshmi Prasad
quote: The previous tenants I found myself were problematic — delayed rent, damage on exit. Nivaas took over both flats. I get paid on the 5th of every month without chasing anyone. The homes are in better condition than when I handed them over.
